meaning: n.山地内部的贫农,山地人
examples: What kind of hillbilly are you, really?
A hillbilly love song was on the jukebox.
A hillbilly was visiting the big city for the first time.
The hillbilly and the Mexico City princess married in 1962 and moved to a farm in Centralia, Wash.
Kennedy Jr. launch George magazine, where he served as a contributing editor and wrote the "Capital Hillbilly" column.
